data.name: Hentai Age Servant
data.detailed_description:
Embark on a gentle and enchanting puzzle adventure where every completed level reveals a stunning portrait of a lovely girl. Enjoy a serene, immersive atmosphere as you arrange tiles and slowly uncover each artwork piece by piece.

Play at your own pace with no timers or pressure—just smooth, relaxing gameplay designed for pure enjoyment. Whether you’re a casual player or a dedicated puzzle fan, the game offers soothing visuals and a calm progression you can return to anytime.

Features :

Charming artwork collection: Reveal new illustrations of beautiful girls as you progress.

Soothing soundscape: Calm, ambient background music sets a peaceful tone.

Complete image gallery: View each finished artwork in full detail after solving the puzzle.

Endless progression: Experience numerous levels with gradually increasing challenge.

Stress-free play: No time limits—solve puzzles comfortably and without rush

data.short_description: Relax in a gentle puzzle adventure where completing each level reveals a beautiful girl’s portrait. Arrange tiles at your own pace, with no pressure, enjoying soothing visuals, calming music, and endlessly comforting gameplay anytime, relaxation
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 捷克文*, 荷蘭文*, 匈牙利文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 繁體中文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
